title: Navarretia stenothyrsa
taxonomy: Navarretia stenothyrsa is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Navarretia. As a member of the Polemoniaceae family, Navarretia stenothyrsa is classified as a member of the plant clade known as the Eudicots. The plant is further classified as part of the clade Asterids, within the Eudicots group. It is native to the southwestern United States.
uses: Navarretia stenothyrsa, a plant native to California, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Research has suggested that it may exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
